{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [{"login": "yuui25", "type": "reporter"}], "credits_detailed": [{"state": "accepted", "type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/29605632?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yuui25/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yuui25/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yuui25/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yuui25/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/yuui25", "id": 29605632, "login": "yuui25", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjI5NjA1NjMy", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yuui25/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yuui25/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yuui25/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yuui25/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yuui25/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/yuui25", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49855", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-409"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-409", "name": "Improper Handling of Highly Compressed Data (Data Amplification)"}], "description": "Tornado's gzip decompression routines work in limited-size chunks, but have no overall limit for the total size of decompressed chunks that they will accumulate (There has always been a limit for the total *compressed* size). This allows a malicious server to consume effectively unlimited amounts of memory if it is accessed via SimpleAsyncHTTPClient in its default configuration. `HTTPServer` is not affected in its default configuration, but it is if `decompress_request=True` is set.

This bug is fixed in Tornado 6.5.6. `max_body_size` is now checked both for the compressed and cumulative decompressed size of the response.

Prior to upgrading, this issue can be mitigated by setting `decompress_response=False` or using `CurlAsyncHTTPClient`.
", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mgf9-4vpg-hj56", "html_url": "https://github.com/tornadoweb/tornado/security/advisories/GHSA-mgf9-4vpg-hj56", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mgf9-4vpg-hj56"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49855"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-05-27T15:45:45Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/160562?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bdarnell/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bdarnell/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bdarnell/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bdarnell/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/bdarnell", "id": 160562, "login": "bdarnell", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE2MDU2Mg==", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bdarnell/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bdarnell/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bdarnell/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bdarnell/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bdarnell/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/bdarnell", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "high", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "tornado AsyncHTTPClient accumulates decompressed chunks without size limit (gzip bomb)", "updated_at": "2026-06-02T19:03:54Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/tornadoweb/tornado/security-advisories/GHSA-mgf9-4vpg-hj56", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "tornado"}, "patched_versions": "6.5.6", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<6.5.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: tornado AsyncHTTPClient accumulates decompressed chunks without size limit (gzip bomb)
